patterns.name: OpenAI API Key
patterns.risk: Access to OpenAI API. Attacker can run models, access fine-tuned models, and incur charges.

patterns.name: OpenAI Project API Key
patterns.risk: Access to OpenAI API within a specific project. Can incur significant charges.

patterns.name: Anthropic API Key
patterns.risk: Access to Claude API. Can incur charges and access conversation data.

patterns.name: Hugging Face Token
patterns.risk: Access to Hugging Face models, datasets, and Spaces. Can access private repositories.
patterns.fix: Use HF_TOKEN or HUGGING_FACE_HUB_TOKEN environment variable.

patterns.name: Replicate API Token
patterns.description: Replicate API token for running ML models
patterns.risk: Access to Replicate API. Can run models and incur charges.
